name: Maxi Cosi Pebble 360 Pro Infant Car Seat
description:
This is the Maxi-Cosi Pebble 360 Pro, a premium infant car seat designed for infants from 40 cm to 87 cm in height (birth to approx. 15 months), with a maximum weight capacity of 13 kg.
Key features include:
• Safety Standards: Complies with the latest UN-Regulation No. 129/03 (i-Size) for enhanced side-impact protection.
• Versatility: It can be installed using a vehicle’s 3-point seat belt (universal belted) or clicked into a FamilyFix 360 Pro base for 360° rotation and "SlideTech" functionality.
• Design: Features an ergonomic carry handle, adjustable harness, and integrated sun canopy.

Pls self collect at Bishan 570124. Thanks

name: Transfer Walking Belt
description:
A transfer walking belt (or gait belt) is a safety device used by caregivers to guide, support, and transfer individuals with limited mobility, such as moving from a bed to a wheelchair. These belts, often featuring padded handles for comfort and improved grip, are applied snugly around the patient's waist over clothing to reduce the risk of falls and caregiver back injury.
